footer.tagline: Transforming your novels into captivating book covers.

home.title: Editorial design
home.subtitle: Transforming your novels into captivating book covers.

about.heroTitle: Hi! I'm Gabi and I'd love for you to get to know me :)
about.intro1: My name is Gabriela Rey, though on social media you probably know me as madameardent. I'm a graphic designer and editorial illustrator and, since 2020, I help authors all over the world dress their novels so they shine and find their place in the market. I love working hand in hand with you, having you present in every step of the process and making sure you feel accompanied, heard and, above all, that you enjoy your project as much as I enjoy creating it with you.
about.intro2: I'm passionate about my work. I've been working very hard for years to be able to do what I do and give your books the best treatment they deserve.
about.intro3Prefix: If you'd like to shape your story with care and enthusiasm, write to me at
about.intro3Suffix: and we'll start this adventure together.
about.storyTitle: Let me tell you my story to inspire yours:
about.y2015: I was making book covers for free as a hobby while studying. It was a way to channel my creativity and my love for reading, never imagining it would become my profession.
about.y2017: I dropped out of my Marine Sciences degree. I didn't know what to do with my future and it was a complicated, gray year, full of uncertainty, in which I had to rethink where I wanted to go.
about.y2020: I finished studying graphic design, opened this account and got my first client. Many people doubted you could make a living from this, but I decided to try anyway and take the first step.
about.y2024: I was fired from a job where I was very unhappy and made the decision to study an advanced master's degree in graphic design to take my business to the next level and dedicate myself to this full-time.
about.y2025: More than 100 books carry my covers and more than 20,000 people follow my work. Today I'm a full-time freelancer and I live off what I love most: dressing stories so they find their readers.
about.writingText: I'm currently working on my first novel and I hope to share more soon about this professional branch of mine in letters and literature.
about.teachingText: I want to help emerging professionals be able to make a living from this as freelancers and build their client base from scratch. The first project will be a complete course teaching you my work system step by step.

contact.title: Tell me your story
contact.intro1a: Stories inspire me. Tell me everything about your project.
contact.intro1bStart: I want to work with you and create the covers we dream of.
contact.intro2: For any other inquiry you can contact us directly at our email:
contact.messagePlaceholder: Describe your project, budget, deadlines and any important details...

servicesIndex.title: My
servicesIndex.subtitle: Every project is unique. Find the service that best fits your novel and let's start shaping it.

items.illustrationDesc: Custom illustrations to accompany your story.
items.mapsDesc: Illustrated maps for fantasy worlds and novels with their own geography.

covers.title: Print
covers.subtitle: Commercial covers for self-publishing or traditional publishing. Includes front, spine and back. With or without flaps.

interiorLayout.title: Print
interiorLayout.epubNoteStart: If, in addition to the print layout, you want the digital e-pub format,
interiorLayout.epubNoteEnd: will be added to the final quote.
interiorLayout.disclaimer: (*) Prices will be adjusted depending on the complexity of the layout. These are examples for novels.

illustration.charactersNote: The simple background is like the one shown in the blue example, monochromatic. A flat background like the yellow one has no additional cost.
illustration.silhouettesText: They feature low-detail characters drawn in flat color over a vivid, lively background.
illustration.sketchesNote: The sketch is characterized by a loose, unfussy line. Perfect for bestiaries and interior layouts on a tight budget.
